chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 992 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22-09-2022 Mr. Bashir Ahmed Shar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 4. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Comments are filed on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4, which reflects that total amount of Rs.7,935,382.00 is outstanding towards GP Fund, LPR 12 months and commutation value, which is payable to the petitioner being his retirement benefits. Learned Counsel appearing for the said respondents ensures that the said amount will be paid to the petitioner within three months hereof. Such endorsement has been made by him on the statement, which is taken on record. This petition is disposed of by directing respondents No.2 to 4 to pay the aforementioned retirement benefits to the petitioner within three months hereof. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
